name: offline-policy-gap-analyzer-desktop
description: Production desktop application for offline policy gap analysis with Ollama
author: Policy Analyzer Team

scripts.dev:electron: wait-on tcp:5173 file:dist/main/index.js && cross-env NODE_ENV=development VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 electron .
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -s first -n RENDERER,MAIN,ELECTRON -c cyan,magenta,yellow "npm run dev:renderer" "npm run dev:main" "npm run dev:electron"
scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run build:main && npm run build:renderer && node scripts/verify-release-assets.mjs
scripts.dist: npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --publish never
